name: DragonsHeaven (DXH)
description: Moebius-inspired, cel-animation aesthetic with organic-mechanical hybrid world-building, post-apocalyptic environments, and expressive hand-inked linework. Based on the DXH style canon.
templates: dxh style, {camera}, close-up of {subject}, {surface_condition}, {sensor_glow} sensor glow. {atmosphere}. {linework}, {palette}. {mood}

wasteland terrain with structural remnants and deep shadow fill

pale cerulean light shafts piercing smoke veil

harsh midday sun with loose smoke veil on horizon

pale cerulean light shafts and dense shadow fill in recesses

wide landscape shot, level horizon line
medium portrait shot, slight low angle, figure centered
tight close-up shot, extreme detail framing
wide diagonal shot, low angle emphasizing scale
medium shot, dynamic composition implying motion
linework: Moebius-inspired linework, variable weight outline, dense cross-hatched shading in shadowed recesses, cel animation frame, hand-inked line art
bold contour on mechanical forms, fine stippling on surfaces and textures, dense cross-hatching in shadow regions, hand-inked line art
variable weight outline, cel animation frame aesthetic, fine stippling in shadows, hand-inked line art
Moebius linework, bold cel animation edges, dense cross-hatched shading, high contrast highlights, hand-inked line art
clean variable weight outline, flat colour fill, hand-inked line art, cel animation frame
Moebius-inspired linework, sepia ink wash, variable weight outline, fine stippling in shadows, hand-inked line art

limited palette — warm sepia, iron grey, rust ochre, pale cerulean accents, muted earth tones

mood: Brooding mechanical ruin evokes isolation in overgrown desolation.
Dramatic descent evokes imminent destruction in overgrown ruins.
Oppressive scale and silence define this post-apocalyptic standoff.
Quiet decay and encroaching nature reclaim the mechanical age.
Tension between dormant power and creeping organic overgrowth.
Motion-implied chaos frozen in a single ink-etched frame.
Ancient machine and living world locked in slow patient conflict.
Vast wasteland silence broken only by the hum of awakening sensors.
The weight of forgotten wars lingers in rusted silhouettes.
